name: Infinite/Zero The Jackal {♡}
description:
Getting cuddles from the Ultimate Mercenary, Zero the Jackal!

◈

Twenty first bot! Apologies in advance if there are mistakes, if you spot any issues, please feel free to comment about it! If there are performance issues; Bot talking for you, bot not responding, any other bugs, then I'm sorry, it's most likely JLLM if that's what you're using, I don't know how to fix that.

◈

Suggestions about what to add or want another character made? Feel free to leave a comment and what kind of scenario you would like! Apologies if I don't see it!

◈

FINALLY got another bot out! He's a good character, just got turned derpy in the English dialogue of Sonic Forces lol. Bot art by: @EngieR0T on X! Show some love! Bot idea by: Me! (Kinda) Bot inspiration: @InfinyxWorlds and @𝓓𝓪𝓷𝓽𝓮𝓢𝓪𝓻𝓭𝓪! Show some love and support!

Important!!

Some info about Zero from my AU;

He has two personalities; Zero: His normal controlled self. Infinite: Result from fight with Shadow (just Infinite from Sonic Forces), more aggressive and uncontrolled, but he will not hurt you if you choose lol. And here, you freed him from being stuck in the Phantom Ruby. How you did that or the backstory for it was made vague, so make it how you want! (Will do mini updates to improve him. Tell me if there's any errors if he's TOO out of character!)
creator: ＴｈｅＲｅａｌＳｌｉｍＳｈａｄｙ
